title: Intensely Roasted Portuguese Tempeh Skewers
description: A quick-fix Portuguese dish featuring roasted tempeh, this recipe is a crunchy and flavorful twist on traditional skewers, perfect for a weeknight dinner. It is also Buddhist-temple-friendly as it is vegetarian and uses tempeh as the main protein source.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, paprika, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and Portuguese seasoning.
Add the tempeh pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated tempeh pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast for 20 minutes.
After 20 minutes, brush the skewers with lemon juice and continue to roast for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and garnish with bay leaves.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional lemon wedges if desired.
